projectDescription: AWS CloudFormation infrastructure-as-code for a multi-service GSM application platform, including ECS-on-EC2 backend microservices, CloudFront+S3 frontend, ECR, cost scheduling, and GitHub Actions OIDC-based CI/CD deployment.
keyFeatures: Three-environment support (dev / qa / prod) via branch-driven GitHub Actions workflows
ECS-on-EC2 cluster running four microservices: Gateway, Auth, Application, and Operations
CloudFront + S3 frontend with SPA router CloudFront Function and Origin Access Control
GitHub OIDC-based keyless authentication — no long-lived AWS credentials in CI/CD
Cost scheduler using EventBridge Scheduler + Lambda to start/stop EC2 and scale ECS on a weekday schedule
AWS Budgets + SNS email alerts for monthly spend threshold
SSM Parameter Store for secrets (JWT, DB connection string) — no plaintext credentials
ECR repository with image scanning on push
IAM least-privilege roles scoped by environment prefix
publicApiSurface: devops/base/template.yml — GitHub OIDC provider + InfraExecutorRole CloudFormation stack
devops/infrastructure/template.yml — Main infrastructure stack (S3, CloudFront, ECS cluster, EC2, ECR, Budget, SNS)
devops/scheduler/template.yml — EventBridge Scheduler + Lambda start/stop stack
.github/workflows/deploy-infrastructure.yml — CI/CD workflow for the infrastructure stack
.github/workflows/deploy-scheduler.yml — CI/CD workflow for the scheduler stack
Lambda StopFunction — scales ECS to 0, disassociates EIP, stops EC2
Lambda StartFunction — starts EC2, reassociates EIP, scales ECS to 1
ECS Services: GatewayService (port 80), AuthService (port 8081), ApplicationService (port 8082), OperationsService (port 8083)
